questions.question: Describe the main differences between a conceptual search and a literal search. How do these differences impact the user interface of a search system?
questions.hint: Provide examples to support your answer

questions.question: What are some common types of search interfaces used today, and how do they address the limitations of traditional text-based search interfaces?
questions.hint: Consider the pros and cons of each type

questions.question: Design a simple search interface that incorporates visualization techniques to help users quickly identify relevant documents. Explain the design decisions you made and how they address the visualization on search interfaces topic.
questions.hint: Consider user needs, search result types, and visual aids
